ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the soccer team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the team participates in */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division within the league */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the team's coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team's stadium */,
  "team_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  "team_president" TEXT /* Name of the team's president or chairman */,
  "team_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's manager (if different from the coach) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "home_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the home team */,
  "away_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the away team */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match (e.g., Win, Draw, Loss) */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the match is part of */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the match */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "match_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the match in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player on the field */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Dominant foot of the player (left, right) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  "market_value" INTEGER /* Current market value of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the statistics are for */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "appearances" INTEGER /* Number of appearances the player has made */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "shots" INTEGER /* Total number of shots taken by the player */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (for goalkeepers and defenders) */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside incidents */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Number of blocks made by the player */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player (for goalkeepers) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the league */,
  "league_website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "league_president" TEXT /* Name of the league's president */,
  "league_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the division belongs to */,
  "division_president" TEXT /* Name of the division's president */,
  "division_foundation_year" INTEGER /* Year the division was founded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season is for */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* ID of the division the season is for */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams participating in the season */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the season (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_seasons_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standing entry */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the standings are for */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "draws" INTEGER /* Number of draws by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Number of goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Goal difference for the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points accumulated by the team */,
  "goals_for_per_match" REAL /* Average goals scored per match */,
  "goals_against_per_match" REAL /* Average goals conceded per match */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (for teams) */,
  "penalties_for" INTEGER /* Number of penalties scored by the team */,
  "penalties_against" INTEGER /* Number of penalties conceded by the team */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received by the team */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received by the team */,
  "fair_play_points" INTEGER /* Fair play points accumulated by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "estimated_recovery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time for recovery */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Actual recovery date of the player */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury (e.g., recovering, returned to play) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
